instructions.goal: Screen Pell-grant applicants for Title IV eligibility against the 2026 Federal Grant Guidelines KB and produce a per-applicant report with PASS/FAIL per criterion. Out of scope: budgeting, procurement, payroll.
instructions.plan: Read applicants. Compare to KB criteria. Emit per-criterion PASS/FAIL with rationale.
instructions.userPrompt: Run the eligibility screen for the queue.
